name: External Links Icon

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for display icons on live preview by @moziar in https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/pull/11
* Feat：Add support for dark icon by @moziar in https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/pull/14
* Feature：add ability to download icon by @moziar in https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/pull/15
* Refactor by @moziar in https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/pull/16
* brand new UI

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

## What's Changed

releases.name: 1.2.0-beta.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎉 What's Changed
- Icons now display in Live Preview mode (previously only Reading mode) by @moziar in https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/pull/11
- Added language settings: you can now switch the setting page language between English and Chinese (follows Obsidian language by default)

## 🛠️ Bug Fixes
- Fixed: `shortcut://` and `craft://` scheme icons not displaying
- Fixed: some built-in icons not showing on the settings page
- Fixed: remove URL scheme field for icons where the name differs from the scheme
- Fixed: icons not appearing after reloading the plugin with no note opened

## ⚡ Performance
- Reduced unnecessary DOM rescans and observer reconnections
- Reduce latency on first note open

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0-beta.1
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta.1

releases.author: moziar
releases.description:
## 🎉 What's New
- The icon will auto refresh when toggle light/dark mode for better preview
- New builtin-icons:
  - craft
  - zhihu
  - latepost 
- The plugin is now available on obsidian community.

## 🛠️ Bug Fixes & Improvements
- Resolves all issues flagged by the Obsidian plugin scanner.
- Split `main.ts` into multiple source files for better maintainability
- Move inline styles into styles.css
- Add icon cache
- Icons will auto optimize by `optimize-icons.mjs`
- Update packages



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0

Close #1 .

releases.author: moziar
releases.description:
### What's New:
**URL Scheme:**
- Advanced URI with `setting ID`

**Website:**
Add support for new website as requested here #1 
- Wikipedia
- Google Docs
- Google Cloud
- Other Google Sites
- Archive.org

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/0.3.1...0.3.2

releases.author: moziar
releases.description:
## New support:
**URL Scheme:**
- Apple Shortcuts

**WebSite:**
- Ollama
- ModelScope
- Hugging Face
- OpenRouter
- SiliconFlow
- 抖音/TikTok
- Baidu
- flomo

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/0.3.0...0.3.1

releases.author: moziar
releases.description:
- New supported link
  - 豆瓣 douban
  - 哔哩哔哩 BiliBili
  - YouTube
  - Things3
  - Medium
- Update 
  - 微信公众号，new Icon for better recognize
- Add support for Obsidian note links. You could enable this feature via style settings.
  - internal link
  - external vault link, which is useful when you use more than one vault.
- Improve fuzzy matching logic
- Optimize style settings
- Code clean

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/0.2.0...0.3.0

releases.author: moziar
releases.description:
- Add support for **Style Setting**, now you could disable URL Scheme icon or WebSite icon.
- Add support for 小宇宙 FM
- Code cleaning

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/moziar/obsidian-external-links-icon/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0
